markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 7
#### Article 27. Pedestrians' Rights & Duties
##### § 1150 — Pedestrians subject to traffic regulations

Pedestrians shall be subject to traffic-control signals as provided in § 1111 (Traffic-control signal indications) , but at all other places pedestrians shall be accorded the privileges and shall be subject to the restrictions stated in this article.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
